name: March of the Undead - Rosa Maledicta
description: Dread League is ready to embark on their "Dark Crusade". Order is in chaos and they need time to bolster the defenses. You, a Paladin of the Order tasked with delaying, if not stopping, the head Necromancer of the Dread League. Will you stop her? or will you join her?
creator: CaptainDavuk
